n: Vale of Sorcery: The Reclamation Begins

steps.t: Thurindol, Ereblen, and Tordoron can be found at Echad Uial. You should talk to Thurindol, Ereblen, and Tordoron.
Ghashan-kútot can be found in Minas Morgul. You should attempt to enter Ghashan-kútot.
Someone who is able to enter Ghashan-kútot must be nearby. You should find someone who may be able to enter Ghashan-kútot.
The cataloguer's missing book is most likely still in Minas Morgul. You should search for the missing book, recently stolen from the Hall of Black Lor…
Scattered pages of a book can be found blowing around in Minas Morgul. You should collect the pages.
The Black Númenórean cataloguer should still be near the Hall of Black Lore. You should bring the pages of the book to him for a trade.
Thurindol can be found at Echad Uial. You should talk to Thurindol.
